evals.name: rejection-video
evals.prompt: Hey, I watched this video earlier today. Can you process it for me? https://youtu.be/-FhtPUkXKO4
evals.expected_output: Structured summary with Frameworks, Decision Heuristics, Provocations, Open Questions sections. Should identify rejection-as-skill thesis, three dimensions (recognition/articulation/encoding), GDP-val reference, and constraint library concept.

evals.name: smoothing-video
evals.prompt: Check out this video and tell me what's useful: https://youtu.be/LO0Ws-l6brg
evals.expected_output: Structured summary covering convergent architecture, jaggedness-as-harness-problem, two tiers of verifiability, and sniff-checking as surviving skill. Should pull vault context related to GSD parallel execution and constraint library.

evals.name: third-video
evals.prompt: I just watched this, harvest it for me: https://youtu.be/lvIF4KwRWiU?si=2uKYy1oaDOyQiPlj
evals.expected_output: Structured summary following the Frameworks/Heuristics/Provocations/Open Questions template. Should handle a potentially different content type and creator gracefully.
